children.name: Get up to 16 GB for referrals
children.characters: Get up to 16 GB for referrals

children.name: Earn 500 MB for every friend who installs the Deupload desktop app—and your friend will get 500 MB too. They can sign up for any plan and you get your bonus space the minute they download the app.
